column3: I've convinced you all that losing that treasure was not my fault right?
The [ing1] and [ing2] soup didn't turn out THAT bad.
I have to admit my [not so miracle cure] was not the best solution to the crew's issues.
I think we've learned a very important lesson.
That the [treasure] is not the most important thing we got from this voyage.
It was the friends we made along the way.
